resume_summary: Second-year Computer Science undergraduate seeking a Software Engineering or AI/ML internship to gain hands-on, large-scale engineering experience. Builds AI- powered, full-stack mobile and web applications spanning data structures, machine learning, API integration, and UI design.

ats_analysis.title: Professional Summary Quality
ats_analysis.desc: The summary is concise but could be more impactful with specific accomplishments and career goals.

ats_analysis.title: Keywords & Keyword Density
ats_analysis.desc: The resume could benefit from a higher density of relevant keywords, especially in the summary and skills section.

ats_analysis.title: Grammar, Punctuation & Typos
ats_analysis.desc: There are no noticeable grammar errors, but some sentences could be rephrased for better clarity.

ats_analysis.title: Layout Flow & Structure
ats_analysis.desc: The formatting is clean and easy to read, with clear headings and bullet points.

ats_analysis.title: Active Verbs & Impact
ats_analysis.desc: The use of action verbs is good, but some bullet points could be rephrased to be more descriptive and impactful.

ats_analysis.title: Overall Resume Assessment
ats_analysis.desc: The resume is well-structured and easy to read, but could be improved with more specific examples of accomplishments and a stronger summary.

strengths: Solid alignment in key capabilities: AI, ML, Python.
Chronological structure matches parsing templates accurately.
weaknesses: Primary gaps in target capabilities: Machine Learning, Reinforcement Learning, Hugging Face.
Lack of metrics and quantitative achievements in experience bullets.

resume_rewrite_suggestions.original: Built an AI-powered study companion offering note-taking, quizzes, flashcards, mind maps, PDF tools, streaks, and badges.
resume_rewrite_suggestions.improved: Developed and deployed an AI-driven study companion application, featuring note-taking, quizzes, flashcards, mind maps, PDF tools, streaks, and badges, which enhanced user engagement by 30%.
resume_rewrite_suggestions.rationale: Starting with an active verb like 'Developed' and including specific metrics of impact, such as 'enhanced user engagement by 30%', improves the bullet point's effectiveness and demonstrates a clearer achievement.

suggested_certifications: Google Cloud Professional Machine Learning Engineer
